text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
MedPAR Codebook │ April 2025 │ V 4.2 

39 
BNDLD_MODEL_DSCNT_PCT 
LABEL: 
Bundled Payment Model Discount Percent 
DESCRIPTION: The field used to identify the discount percentage that will be applied to the payment for all the 
hospitals' DRG over the lifetime of the Bundled Payments for Care Improvement initiative (BPCI, Model 
1). 
SHORT NAME: BNDLD_MODEL_DSCNT_PCT 
LONG NAME: BNDLD_MODEL_DSCNT_PCT 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
8 
SOURCE: 
NCH
